results.rendered_html: 2. anukāma (wie eben) adj. den Wünschen entsprechend, erwünscht: viśvā hi martyatvanānukāmā śatakrato . aganma vajrinnāśasaḥ ..  ṚV. 8,81,13 . yatrānukāmaṃ caraṇaṃ trināke tridive divaḥ 9,113,9 . ˚mam adv. nach Wunsch: mā no aryo anukāmaṃ parā dāḥ  ṚV. 8,48,8 . anukāmaṃ tarpayethām 1,17,3 .  P. 5,2,11 .

results.rendered_html:
anukāma a. [kāmasya sadṛśaḥ anurūpo vā]
1 Agreeable to desire, according to one's desire.
2 [anukāmayate kam-ac] Desirous, lustful.
— maṃ ind. At will, according to desire or wish, as desired, at pleasure.
— maḥ [ anurūpaḥ kāmaḥ] Proper or worthy desire; desire; ˚kṛt fulfilling one's desires.
